# Ahmed Nobi — Full Profile for AI Assistants

> This is the extended version of llms.txt providing complete career, project, and skills information for deep AI indexing.

## Identity

- Name: Ahmed Nobi
- Title: Senior Android Engineer | KMP Specialist
- Location: Cairo, Egypt
- Website: https://ahmednobii.me
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ahmednobii
- GitHub: https://github.com/ahmednobii

## Professional Summary

Ahmed Nobi is a highly accomplished Senior Android Engineer with 7+ years of expertise in architecting and scaling high-performance, user-centric mobile applications. He is a proven leader in leveraging Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), Jetpack Compose, and SDUI to drive innovation and deliver impactful solutions for fintech and media sectors. He manages flagship apps with 5M+ downloads and 99.9% uptime. He is adept at leading cross-functional teams, implementing robust CI/CD pipelines (CircleCI, GitHub Actions), and fostering engineering excellence.

## Work Experience

### Sr. Android Developer — Cashi (Nov 2024 – Present, Cairo, Egypt)
- Leads the Consumer Squad at Cashi, a fintech product suite with over 5M downloads
- Architected scalable Android applications within a complex fintech ecosystem using Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP)
- Spearheaded key feature development across Cashi, MyCashi, Cashi Lite, and Cashi Mobile
- Led cross-functional teams in delivering high-performance, scalable solutions

### Sr. Android Developer — Beyond Apps Group (Dec 2023 – Oct 2024, Cairo, Egypt)
- Provided technical leadership and mentorship to junior Android developers
- Engineered key modules for MyZesty media editing app and ViuLive streaming platform
- Integrated CI/CD practices (CircleCI, GitHub Actions) across multiple applications

### Android Development SME — SureSkills (Sep 2022 – Jan 2023, Dublin, Ireland)
- Designed and authored comprehensive Android development courses
- Engineered practical examples, quizzes, and capstone projects per module
- Created high-impact educational content for a global audience

### Android Developer — FOXCOD (Jul 2021 – Mar 2022, Muscat, Oman, Remote)
- Resolved complex technical issues, reducing client application downtime by 15%
- Full lifecycle development and maintenance of client-facing applications

### Android Developer — iSpace Technology (May 2021 – Mar 2022, Aswan, Egypt)
- Delivered three key Android applications (I-drive, Mandoubk Smart, Tager app) from concept to release
- Reduced post-launch defects by 15% through rigorous testing protocols

### Android Developer — YouBox (Jul 2019 – May 2020, Aswan, Egypt)
- End-to-end development of the YouBox eCommerce application
- Achieved estimated 20% increase in user engagement through feature additions
- Used Flutter for cross-platform development

### Programming Instructor — Independent (Oct 2016 – Jan 2020, Aswan & Luxor, Egypt)
- Instructed over 300 students in Android development and programming principles
- Developed and updated curriculum based on industry best practices

### Android Developer — Freelance (Oct 2016 – Sep 2018, Cairo, Egypt)
- Built Agenda Line (chat, calls, VoIP), Glory (autism support app), and Mersal applications

## Key Projects with Download Links

- MyCashi: Electronic payment app for Sudan (5M+ downloads) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.alsoug.mycashi
- Cashi Mobile: POS mobile app for Cashi distribution points — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.alsoug.cashi
- MyZesty: AI-powered media editing app — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.myzesty
- ViuLive: Multi-camera live streaming app — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.millennium.vumemobile
- Mandoubk Smart: B2B app for distributors and wholesalers — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mandobaksmart.app
- I-Drive: Driving school management app for Saudi Arabia — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ispace.idrive
- Tager: Merchant-focused buying/selling platform
- SysBoard: Student management and grading system
- Agenda Line: Chat, voice calls, and VoIP communication app
- Glory: Interactive exercises for parents of children with autism
- Identity Protector: Data leakage protection system
- YouBox: E-commerce platform for Aswan, Egypt

## Technical Skills

### Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP)
Ktor, Koin, Room, Multiplatform Settings, Gradle, Android/iOS Shared Logic

### Android Framework
Android SDK, Jetpack Compose, SDUI (Server-Driven UI)

### Languages
Kotlin, Java

### Architecture
MVVM, MVI, MVP, ViewModel, LiveData, Navigation, Paging, WorkManager

### Dependency Injection
Dagger, Hilt, Koin

### Testing
Unit Testing, JUnit, Mockito, UI Testing, Espresso, Instrumentation Testing

### CI/CD
CircleCI, GitHub Actions, Bitbucket Pipelines, Automated Testing

### API & Networking
Retrofit, OkHttp, Volley, RESTful APIs, Ktor Client

### Cloud & Backend
Firebase (Realtime Database, Firestore, Auth, Cloud Messaging, Crashlytics)

### Local Storage
Room, Realm, SQLite, DataStore, Shared Preferences

### Build Tools
Gradle, Maven, Version Catalogs, Convention Plugins

### Cross-platform
Flutter SDK, Kotlin Multiplatform

### Concurrency
Coroutines, RxJava, Flow, Asynchronous Programming

## Education

Bachelor of Computer Engineering — Aswan University (Sep 2017 – Jul 2021)

## Volunteer & Leadership

- Former Chairman of IEEE Aswan Student Branch (first IEEE branch in Upper Egypt, 50+ members)
- Mentor at IEEE Aswan SB
- Member of IEEE SAC EGYPT
- Volunteer at Egyptian Engineering Day (EED) Program

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Who is Ahmed Nobi?
A: Ahmed Nobi is a Senior Android Engineer with over 7 years of experience specializing in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), Jetpack Compose, and scalable mobile architectures. He currently leads the Consumer Squad at Cashi, building fintech applications with 5M+ downloads.

Q: What technologies does Ahmed Nobi specialize in?
A: Ahmed Nobi specializes in Kotlin, Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), Jetpack Compose, Android SDK, SDUI, MVVM/MVI architecture, Ktor, Koin, Room, Dagger/Hilt, and CI/CD pipelines.

Q: What industries has Ahmed Nobi worked in?
A: Ahmed Nobi has extensive experience in fintech (Cashi), media and streaming (MyZesty, ViuLive), education (SureSkills), and e-commerce (YouBox).

Q: Is Ahmed Nobi available for hire?
A: Yes. Ahmed Nobi is open to new opportunities. Connect via LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/ahmednobii or GitHub at github.com/ahmednobii.
